settings.title: Our Spring Single-Origin Has Landed
settings.excerpt: A bright, citrus-forward Ethiopian lot is now pouring on bar through the end of June.
settings.body:
We taste a lot of coffee to choose just one. This spring it was an easy call: a washed Yirgacheffe with notes of bergamot, white peach, and a clean honeyed finish.

It is on as a pour-over and as a single-origin espresso, so you can taste how the roast shifts across brew methods. Our baristas are happy to walk you through both.

Stop by before the end of June while the lot lasts.
